opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain in my foot is absolute torture when I lie in bed. I have to sleep in the chair with my leg hanging down just to survive the night.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A sore on my ankle has slowly got bigger over weeks and now the pain is unbearable, especially at night — I haven't slept in days and the paracetamol does nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: a small sore appeared on the outer part of my right ankle about 6 weeks ago and has slowly got bigger; the pain became severe over the last 5 days
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 weeks for the sore, about 5 days of severe pain
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, constant, gnawing pain in the foot; the sore has gone dry and black in the middle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — absolute torture, I can't sleep at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right foot and the sore on the outer ankle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: much worse at night and when I lie flat or raise the leg; eases when I let the leg hang down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hanging the leg off the side of the bed or sitting in the chair with the foot down on the floor
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down flat and lifting or propping the leg up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the foot feels really cold compared to the other one, and the skin on the lower leg looks pale and shiny
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically stuck at home, exhausted, and I'm scared of falling because I'm so tired

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol for the leg pain, but it isn't helping at all

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: elderly, lives alone, housebound because of the pain, worried about falling because of exhaustion and lack of sleep

objective_data_offered.value: my right foot feels perishingly cold to touch, colder than the left one
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own hand comparison, not a measured temperature

objective_data_offered.value: an open sore about 3 cm across on my outer right ankle; the middle looks dry and black, and there's no redness or pus around it
the skin on my lower right leg looks pale, shiny and hairless compared to the other leg
